purpose: Constrain what BOOT_METABLOOMS.py is allowed to import to prevent authority drift.

rationale.metablooms.runtime.row: ROW is execution plumbing; BOOT must not execute pipelines.
rationale.metablooms.nl: Natural language mapping is UI-layer; BOOT must remain governance-only.
rationale.metablooms.segments.adapters: Adapters may call subprocesses; BOOT must not run segments.
